data.title: Migrate merge-to-main.sh archive phase to read PRECONDITIONS with graceful-degrade
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Objective
Update merge-to-main.sh's `_phase_archive()` function to read PRECONDITIONS events for the ticket being merged and include the summary in the archive phase output. Mixed-format archives (pre-rollout + rollout tickets) render correctly without error.

## Files to Modify
- `plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh` — update `_phase_archive()` function

## Implementation Notes
1. In `_phase_archive()`: after the existing archive logic, and only when a TICKET_ID is available:
   - Source `ticket-lib.sh` (use `_PLUGIN_ROOT`-relative path)
   - Call `_read_latest_preconditions "$TICKET_ID" 2>/dev/null`
   - On success: include `preconditions_summary=<manifest_depth>` in the phase's log output
   - On zero events (exit 1): include `preconditions_summary=pre-manifest` in the phase log
   - Never fail-hard: `|| true` wrapper
2. The archive phase is currently a no-op comment (`# --- 4.5) Archive phase (no-op ... ---`). The PRECONDITIONS read is additive — the phase remains effectively a no-op in terms of state changes; it only emits diagnostic information.

## Legacy-ticket graceful-degrade contract
- All non-zero exits from `_read_latest_preconditions` → log "pre-manifest", continue
- Mixed corpus (some tickets with events, some without) → each ticket logs its own status independently

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_merge_archive_includes_preconditions_summary passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh test_merge_archive_includes_preconditions_summary
- [ ] test_merge_archive_legacy_ticket_pre_manifest passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh test_merge_archive_legacy_ticket_pre_manifest
- [ ] `_read_latest_preconditions` call has `|| true` guard
  Verify: grep -A2 "_read_latest_preconditions" plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh | grep -q "|| true"
- [ ] All pre-existing merge-to-main tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh 2>&1 | grep "^FAIL" | grep -vc "preconditions\|pre_manifest" | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
- [ ] Script is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
